holdings.infoBox: BITQ is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are IREN Limited stock at 11.62%, Hut 8 at 8.34%, Strategy at 6.76%, Riot Platforms at 6.24%, and TeraWulf at 6.24%.

overview.description: The Bitwise Crypto Industry Innovators ETF (BITQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bitwise Crypto Innovators 30 index. The fund is passively managed to track a modified market-cap-weighted index of global companies supporting a crypto-asset-enabled decentralized economy. BITQ was launched on May 11, 2021 and is issued by Bitwise.
